segments.text: Keeps going with up air, feinting another one
segments.original_text: 緩めない空上もう一回空上すると見せかけて

segments.text: Steve's mash-out looks like it's coming in time
segments.original_text: さあスティーブの暴れが間に合いそうだと

segments.text: The moment he sees it, he resets
segments.original_text: 見るや否や一旦リセット
下スマッシュをシールドして

full_text: Keeps going with up air, feinting another one Steve's mash-out looks like it's coming in time The moment he sees it, he resets Shields the down smash

corrections.original: 緩めない空中へもう一回空へすると見せかけて
corrections.corrected: 緩めない空上もう一回空上すると見せかけて
corrections.rule: Move abbreviation correction (空中へ/空へ → 空上)
